name: El Dorado Springs Community Center
description: El Dorado Springs Community Center is a place to play pickleball in El Dorado Springs, MO. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: No play on Tuesday, Nov. 5th due to election taking place in the gym.

name: Expo Center at Stockton Lake
description: Expo Center at Stockton Lake is a place to play pickleball in Stockton, MO. There are 3 indoor concrete and hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: First Southern Baptist Church
description: First Southern Baptist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Stockton, MO. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are private.
